title: Super Jump Boots
description: Adds a new item to the game called "Super Jump Boots" which you can use to launch yourself several blocks up in the air.
body:
This mod adds a fun and exciting new item to Minecraft called "Super Jump Boots" that lets you launch yourself high into the sky!

![boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b484267ad21eaf02a1b841c878a6ea4eca8b861.png)

## Crafting
1 nether star, 2 feathers, 1 leather boot

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e6b14a7038406765d4f56b92dd4e5b29a5fab54.png)
